summary: Frontend testing for otobrothers — SEO meta tags (react-helmet-async), GDPR cookie consent banner, file renaming (Newsletter→FreeResources, Contact→Products), and nav/routing. All 14 tests passed.
passed_tests: Cookie consent banner appears on first visit (data-testid='cookie-consent-banner') with 800ms delay
Accept button dismisses banner and stores 'accepted' in localStorage key 'cookie_consent'
Banner does NOT reappear after accepting (localStorage persisted across reload)
Decline button dismisses banner and stores 'declined' in localStorage
Cookie Policy link (data-testid='cookie-policy-link') has correct href and opens in new tab (target=_blank)
Home page title = 'otobrothers | AI Automation Consultancy for SMBs'
Case Studies page title = 'Case Studies | otobrothers AI Automation'
About page title = 'About | otobrothers AI Automation Consultancy'
Free Resources page (/newsletter) title = 'Free Resources | otobrothers AI Automation'
Products page (/contact) title = 'Products | otobrothers AI Training Workshops'
Products page (data-testid='contact-page') shows two product tiles with Roman numerals i/ii/iii/iv under Tile 1 'Tech stack overview:'
All nav links work: Home, Case Studies, About, Free Resources, Products
'Your call' CTA scrolls to #contact section on Home page (scrollY=2205px)
'Your call' CTA from another page navigates to home and triggers scroll
additional_observations: Google Calendar embed now shows 'Free consultation - 25 min appointments' (previous iteration_1 issue resolved)
HelmetProvider correctly wraps entire app in App.js
CookieConsent component placed outside Routes — renders on all pages
FreeResources.jsx (/newsletter route) and Products.jsx (/contact route) correctly renamed and mapped
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found — all implementation is correct and tested
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO + cookie consent features verified working. Cookie banner uses localStorage key 'cookie_consent' with 800ms delay. All page titles correct via react-helmet-async. /newsletter=FreeResources, /contact=Products. Roman numerals i/ii/iii/iv under Product Tile 1 tech stack. No outstanding issues from iterations 1-3.
